scope: B2 F0/S0 retained Freqtrade validation package

attacks_attempted.finding: Frozen dataset, normalized run artifacts, rerun evidence, and lineage references are present; cross-tool MLflow/DVC restore parity is not claimed.
attacks_attempted.falsification_test: Recompute dataset manifest and normalized metric hashes from a clean checkout, then compare run1/run2 and lineage records byte-for-byte.

attacks_attempted.finding: The complete six-cell fee/slippage surface is negative in every retained scenario.
attacks_attempted.falsification_test: Recompute net PnL across F0/S0, F1/S1, F1/S2, F1/S3, F2/S2, and F2/S3 and fail if any cell is omitted or changes without provenance.

attacks_attempted.finding: Signal and fill timing are documented; the engine lookahead follow-up remains WARN because Freqtrade overrides requested stake and trade-limit settings.
attacks_attempted.falsification_test: Run the engine lookahead analysis with fixed stake and max-open-trade controls, inspect effective configuration, and reject if the controls are overridden or leakage is detected.

attacks_attempted.finding: Temporal and signal-parity checks pass for the retained fixtures, but the engine-specific lookahead warning is not resolved.
attacks_attempted.falsification_test: Run clean and deliberately leaky fixtures through temporal checks and compare feature availability timestamps against decision timestamps.

attacks_attempted.finding: Holdout trades are segmented across eight descriptive ex-post volatility/trend/volume combinations; no causal or predictive regime claim is made.
attacks_attempted.falsification_test: Rebuild the holdout regime labels from canonical bars and verify every trade is assigned only from information available at or before its entry bar.

attacks_attempted.finding: PBO/DSR remain deferred method candidates pending primary-literature review and known-answer fixtures.
attacks_attempted.falsification_test: Do not activate G10 until independent fixture outputs match documented estimators and all tried configurations and selection rules are retained.

operator_decision: Keep B2 as a rejected infrastructure baseline; do not promote to paper or live trading. Resolve G4 and complete engine parity before any prototype approval decision.
